blockedAssertions.blockedBy: `spikes whoami` still fails immediately after login because `https://spikes.sh/me` returns HTML instead of JSON user info.
`spikes whoami` cannot parse identity because production `https://spikes.sh/me` returns HTML (`JSON error: expected value at line 1 column 1`).

appliedUpdates.description: Documented CLI whoami production-routing blocker (`https://spikes.sh/me` returning HTML) and local-worker fallback check (`http://localhost:8787/me`).
